calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Continued To Apr-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TRINET GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is granted. Defendant establishes there is a valid and enforceable written agreement that mandates arbitration of Plaintiff's claims. (Declaration of Heather Jo Donnelly, Ex. A, Terms and Conditions Agreement, par. 9.) The arbitration agreement is governed by the Federal Arbitration Act because the complaint admits that Plaintiff engaged in interstate commerce while employed by Defendant and because the agreement specifically invokes the FAA. (Id. at par. 9a; Complaint, par. 7.) Accordingly, Lab. Code sec. 229 is preempted. (Perry v. Thomas (1987) 482 U.S. 483, 492.) This litigation is stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MULESOFT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is granted. Defendant establishes there is a valid and enforceable written agreement that mandates arbitration of Plaintiff's claims. (Declaration of Jessica Pfisterer, Ex. A, Employment Agreement, par. 12.) The arbitration agreement is governed by the Federal Arbitration Act because the complaint admits that Plaintiff engaged in interstate commerce while employed by Defendant. (Complaint, par. 7.) Accordingly, Lab. Code sec. 229 is preempted. (Perry v. Thomas (1987) 482 U.S. 483, 492.) This litigation is stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Continued To Jun-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MULESOFT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is continued to June 11, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per agreement of the parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Continued To Jun-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is continued to June 11, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per agreement of the parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302.
